GPT-5-mini's description 'Clutterbuck 10th and last Instalment' is more accurate (visually confirmed 'Clutterbuck' and '10th'). Gemini-flash's amounts (10, 7, 3) are visually confirmed over GPT-5-mini's zero shillings/pence.

rows.description: Colby. Domus Increment. including £38.17.6 late Bal.
rows.notes: Gemini-flash's description 'Colby... late Bal.' is more accurate. GPT-5-mini's shillings (18) and pence (10) are correct. Pounds figure (500) read directly from image, correcting both extractors. Gemini-flash had erroneously placed '208' here.
rows.english_description: Increment (domus increment) income from the Colby fund or house, including a late balance.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Increment income from the Colby fund or house, amounting to £500 18s 10d (including a late balance previously £38 17s 6d).

rows.english_description_with_amount: Second instalment/payment relating to the Colby increment, amounting to £208 5s 4d.
